basic_details.job_title: DRDO NMRL Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Naval Materials Research Laboratory (DRDO NMRL) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 20 Paid Internship Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 25 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Pursuing Graduates in Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 7.0 in all previous semesters, Pursuing Post Graduate in Science with minimum 65% marks in the 1st year exam, Student must be enrolled for full time course from a AICTE/UGC approved College/University

B.E./ B.Tech Computer Science/ Engineering/ Information Technology

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: B.E./ B.Tech Computer Science/ Engineering/ Information Technology

selection_process: Merit based on marks scored in previous exams Online interview / interaction
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO NMRL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO NMRL Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the DRDO NMRL Paid Internship is 10-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available for the Paid Internship?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies announced for the Paid Internship positions at the Naval Materials Research Laboratory (DRDO NMRL).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this internship?
faq.answer: Candidates should be pursuing Graduates in Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 7.0 or pursuing Post Graduate in Science with a minimum of 65% marks in the 1st year. The course must be full-time and from an AICTE/UGC approved institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this internship is 25 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary or stipend offered for this internship?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000 Per Month for the duration of the internship.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the DRDO NMRL Paid Internship?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email. You must prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit from previous academic performance and an online interview or interaction with the candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Naval Materials Research Laboratory (DRDO NMRL) located?
faq.answer: The Naval Materials Research Laboratory (DRDO NMRL) is located in Ambernath, Maharashtra, with the pincode 421506.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the internship?
faq.answer: The internship is a contractual position, and the start date for the internship is mentioned as 01-07-2026. Specific duration details should be confirmed in the official notification.
